title: EverUncomplete
description: An uncomplete modpack (for now!) for me and my friends but anyone is free to use it :). This iteration of the modpack features mods for exploration, magic and engineering for Fabric 1.20.1.
body:
The EverUncomplete modpack is designed to be used by my friends to join my server, however everyone is free to use it as they please :).

This modpack has been downgraded to 1.20.1 in fabric for the use on my private server. It's not a lightweight modpack anymore. It now features mods for exploration, magic and engineering. The modpack will however continue to be updated to the best of my ability so enjoy!
